---
title: "Class 26022026 - Logarithmic Model"
author: "César Tzoc Alvarado"
date: "2026-02-26"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(openxlsx)
library(here)
```

## Read data about geiser
```{r load-data}
geiser <- read.xlsx(here("mrl/class26022026/geiser.xlsx"), sheet = 1)
```

## Plot espera vs erupcion
```{r plot-espera-vs-erupcion}
plot(
  geiser$espera,
  geiser$erupcion,
  main = "Espera vs Erupción del Geiser",
  xlab = "Espera (min)",
  ylab = "Erupción (min)",
  pch = 19,
  col = "blue"
)
```

## Logarithmic model
```{r logarithmic-model}
geiser$log_espera <- log(geiser$espera)
geiser_model <- lm(erupcion ~ log_espera, data = geiser)
geiser_model
```

## Summary of the model
```{r summary-of-the-model}
summary(geiser_model)
```

## Predictions
```{r predictions}
geiser$predicted_erupcion <- predict(geiser_model)
plot(
  geiser$log_espera,
  geiser$predicted_erupcion,
  main = "Espera vs prediccción Erupción  del Geiser",
  xlab = "Espera (min)",
  ylab = "Predicción Erupción (min)",
  pch = 21,
  col = "red"
)
```

## Define formula
```{r define-formula}
formula <- function(x) {
  coef(geiser_model)[1] + coef(geiser_model)[2] * log(x)
  # geiser_model$coefficients[[1]] + geiser_model$coefficients[[2]] * log(x)
}
```

## Plot original vs predicted
```{r plot-original-vs-predicted}
plot(
  geiser$espera,
  geiser$erupcion,
  main = "Espera vs Erupción del Geiser",
  xlab = "Espera (min)",
  ylab = "Erupción (min)",
  pch = 19,
  col = "red"
)
par(new = T)
plot(
  geiser$espera,
  formula(geiser$espera),
  col = 'blue',
  type = 'l',
  lwd = 1,
  xlab = "", ylab = "", axes = FALSE
)

```
